meta.title: Traditional Startup Support Programs — Active Global Database
meta.note: Active accelerators, incubators, talent investors and startup campuses worldwide (no residential/co-living requirement). Recruiting status is best-available public info as of June 2026 and changes frequently — always confirm on each program's site. Companion to the residential database (startup-programs-data.json).

status_legend.rolling: Accepts applications on a rolling/always-open basis
status_legend.open: A specific cohort window is currently open
status_legend.closing-soon: Open but with an imminent deadline
status_legend.opening-soon: Next cohort applications announced, opening shortly
status_legend.closed: Latest cohort closed; check site for next cycle

programs.name: Y Combinator
programs.status_detail: Now funds ~1,000 companies/yr across multiple batches. $500K total ($125K for 7% + $375K MFN SAFE), 3 months in SF.
programs.highlight: 5,000+ alumni companies; the reference point for the whole category.

programs.name: Techstars
programs.status_detail: Dozens of city/vertical programs worldwide; $20K for 5% + $200K MFN SAFE.
programs.highlight: One of the largest global accelerator networks.

programs.name: a16z Speedrun
programs.status_detail: SR007 apps closed May 17, 2026; cohort runs late Jul–Oct 2026. Up to $1M. <0.4% acceptance.
programs.highlight: a16z's ultra-competitive in-house accelerator.

programs.name: 500 Global (Flagship)
programs.status_detail: 4-month Flagship in Palo Alto, $150K for 6%; batches several times a year.
programs.highlight: Global accelerator + fund active across 80+ countries.

programs.name: Pear VC (PearX)
programs.status_detail: 12-week program, $250K–$2M, max ~20 companies.
programs.highlight: Boutique, high-touch Bay Area accelerator.

programs.name: Alchemist Accelerator
programs.status_detail: 6-month program, $25K–$50K; B2B/enterprise focus.
programs.highlight: The go-to enterprise-focused accelerator.

programs.name: LAUNCH Accelerator
programs.status_detail: 14–15 weeks, $125K for 7%.
programs.highlight: Founder-friendly accelerator from Jason Calacanis.

programs.name: Founder Institute
programs.status_detail: 4-month program; runs in 200+ cities worldwide; equity via warrants.
programs.highlight: The world's largest pre-seed accelerator by geographic reach.

programs.name: AI Grant
programs.status_detail: $250K uncapped SAFE + $600K+ in credits for AI-native startups.
programs.highlight: High-signal AI accelerator from Friedman & Gross.

programs.name: Conviction Embed
programs.status_detail: 8-week program; $150K–$250K uncapped MFN SAFE + large cloud credits.
programs.highlight: AI-first program from Conviction.

programs.name: Betaworks Camp
programs.status_detail: 12-week NYC program, up to $500K, themed AI 'Camps.'
programs.highlight: Long-running NYC studio + camp model.

programs.name: MassChallenge
programs.status_detail: 4-month program, NO EQUITY, $200K+ in prizes; Boston/Texas/Switzerland/Israel.
programs.highlight: Major equity-free accelerator network.

programs.name: Plug and Play
programs.status_detail: 12-week programs, NO EQUITY; global corporate-innovation platform.
programs.highlight: World's largest corporate-innovation/accelerator platform.

programs.name: Sequoia Arc
programs.status_detail: Open to Sequoia-backed founders only; 4-day/4-week intensive, $500K–$1M.
programs.highlight: Sequoia's structured company-building program.

programs.name: Entrepreneur First (EF)
programs.status_detail: Builds teams from individuals; also Paris, Bangalore, NYC & SF. ~$80–100K for 8–10%.
programs.highlight: Pioneered 'talent investing' — backing people before they have a company.

programs.name: Antler
programs.status_detail: 30+ global locations; ~6-week residency + investment phase, $100K–$190K for ~10%, +$250K follow-on.
programs.highlight: Among the most geographically distributed day-zero programs.

programs.name: Seedcamp
programs.status_detail: €100K–€200K for ~7%; portfolio includes Wise, Revolut, UiPath.
programs.highlight: 'Europe's seed fund' — flagship early-stage program.

programs.name: Station F
programs.focus: All sectors; 1,000+ startups under one roof
programs.status_detail: World's largest startup campus; home to ~30 programs (Founders Program, Fighters, partner accelerators).
programs.highlight: The world's biggest startup campus, in a former Paris railway depot.

programs.name: Startup Wise Guys
programs.status_detail: Up to €65K for equity; one of Europe's most active B2B accelerators.
programs.highlight: Leading Central/Eastern European B2B accelerator.

programs.name: APX
programs.status_detail: Up to €500K (typically €50K for 5%); rolling intake in Berlin.
programs.highlight: Berlin's joint Axel Springer–Porsche early-stage accelerator.

programs.name: Founders Factory
programs.status_detail: Accelerator + studio with corporate partners; also operates in Africa.
programs.highlight: Corporate-backed European accelerator and venture studio.

programs.name: Wayra (Telefónica)
programs.status_detail: Telefónica's open-innovation accelerator across Europe & LatAm hubs.
programs.highlight: One of the largest corporate accelerators by footprint.

programs.name: Hub71
programs.focus: Tech startups; AI, fintech, climate, deep tech
programs.status_detail: AED 250K cash (SAFE) + AED 250K in-kind; 'Access' track up to AED 500K equity-free, plus subsidized housing/office. Partners with Techstars Hub71.
programs.highlight: Abu Dhabi's flagship global tech ecosystem.

programs.name: Flat6Labs
programs.status_detail: $30K–$250K; programs across Cairo, Riyadh, Abu Dhabi, Bahrain & beyond. 200+ startups since 2011.
programs.highlight: The MENA region's seed-accelerator mainstay.

programs.name: MEST Africa
programs.status_detail: Entrepreneur training + seed fund + hubs across Accra, Lagos, Nairobi & Cape Town.
programs.highlight: Long-running pan-African founder training + seed program.

programs.name: Startupbootcamp AfriTech
programs.status_detail: Part of the global Startupbootcamp family; AfriTech runs from Cape Town.
programs.highlight: Africa arm of a global industry-accelerator family.

programs.name: Founders Factory Africa
programs.status_detail: African arm of Founders Factory; build + scale programs.
programs.highlight: Pan-African accelerator and venture studio.

programs.name: Platanus Ventures
programs.status_detail: $200K for ~7% (historically); 2026 calls open + Latam hackathon tour across 5 cities. 'The YC of LatAm.'
programs.highlight: Chile's YC-style accelerator, now expanding pan-regionally.

programs.name: Start-Up Chile
programs.status_detail: Public accelerator with equity-free grants; among the top accelerators in LatAm.
programs.highlight: Pioneering government-run accelerator; a LatAm anchor.

programs.name: NXTP
programs.status_detail: Most pan-regional early-stage firm in LatAm (Argentina, Chile, Colombia, Mexico, Peru, Brazil).
programs.highlight: LatAm's most active early-stage regional investor.

programs.name: Peak XV Surge
programs.status_detail: 16-week hybrid program; up to $3M seed; ~4,800 apps/cohort. Surge 11 = 23 startups.
programs.highlight: The premier India/SEA seed program.

programs.name: Iterative
programs.status_detail: Two 12-week programs/yr; $150K–$500K for ~10–15%.
programs.highlight: YC-style accelerator for Southeast Asia.

programs.name: Startmate
programs.status_detail: 12-week program; ~AUD $120K at $1.5M post; ANZ's leading accelerator.
programs.highlight: The anchor accelerator for Australia & New Zealand.

programs.name: Creative Destruction Lab (CDL)
programs.status_detail: 9-month objectives-based mentoring, NO EQUITY; 15+ global sites.
programs.highlight: Objectives-driven deep-tech program spun out of U of Toronto.

programs.name: Antler India
programs.status_detail: India arm of Antler's day-zero model; co-founder matching + first cheque.
programs.highlight: Antler's fast-growing India program.

programs.name: IndieBio (SOSV)
programs.status_detail: 4-month program (SF/NYC), ~$525K for ~10%; lab access included.
programs.highlight: Leading biology-focused accelerator with wet-lab space.

programs.name: HAX (SOSV)
programs.status_detail: 6 months in Newark (+ Shenzhen/Pune/Tokyo); $250K initial.
programs.highlight: Lab-based hard-tech program with global build sites.

programs.name: gener8tor
programs.status_detail: GBeta + full accelerator across 40+ US programs; ~$100K investments.
programs.highlight: Prolific accelerator network across mid-America.

programs.name: StartX (Stanford)
programs.status_detail: 3-month program, NO EQUITY, $1M+ in resources; 1,300+ companies, 20 unicorns.
programs.highlight: Stanford's non-profit, equity-free accelerator and founder community.

programs.name: Berkeley SkyDeck
programs.status_detail: $200K for 7.5%, 6-month program, Demo Day to 600+ investors. Batch 23 apps open in July.
programs.highlight: UC Berkeley's flagship accelerator.

programs.name: Capital Factory
programs.status_detail: 1% for up to $100K via All Access Fund + coworking, mentorship; ~2,000 investments since 2009.
programs.highlight: 'Center of gravity for entrepreneurs' outside Silicon Valley — Austin's anchor.

programs.name: MuckerLab
programs.status_detail: $100K–$175K for 10–15%; long-term, highly selective LA program.
programs.highlight: LA's leading operator-led accelerator.

programs.name: Forum Ventures
programs.focus: B2B SaaS, AI/LLM, fintech, supply chain
programs.status_detail: $100K from accelerator (also Studio $250K, fund $500K–$1M); 100+ companies/yr. NY/SF/Toronto.
programs.highlight: Prolific B2B-SaaS pre-seed accelerator + AI venture studio.

programs.name: Conception X
programs.status_detail: Venture program turning PhD researchers into deep-tech founders; equity-light.
programs.highlight: UK's deep-tech PhD-to-startup venture program.

programs.name: Outlier Ventures
programs.status_detail: 9-week Base Camp accelerator; current Injective Catalyst cohort open. Partners with Polkadot, Polygon, Filecoin.
programs.highlight: The leading dedicated Web3 accelerator.

programs.name: Kickstart Innovation
programs.status_detail: 2-month program, CHF 10K allowance + VC/partner network; one of Europe's largest zero-equity programs.
programs.highlight: Switzerland's flagship corporate-innovation accelerator.

programs.name: Rockstart
programs.status_detail: 6-month programs; SAFE + follow-on up to €2M. Amsterdam, Copenhagen & Bogotá.
programs.highlight: Long-running European domain-focused accelerator.

programs.name: Norrsken Impact Accelerator
programs.status_detail: 8-week sprint at Norrsken House Stockholm for early-stage impact startups.
programs.highlight: Europe's flagship impact accelerator (Niklas Adalberth, Klarna co-founder).

programs.name: Norrsken House Kigali
programs.status_detail: East Africa's largest startup hub; built to house 1,000+ entrepreneurs.
programs.highlight: Norrsken's African campus — a continental hub.

programs.name: CcHub (Co-Creation Hub)
programs.status_detail: Africa's largest innovation ecosystem; hubs in Nigeria, Rwanda, Namibia & Togo.
programs.highlight: The anchor innovation hub of West Africa.

programs.name: The Baobab Network
programs.status_detail: $50K investments + hands-on accelerator for African startups.
programs.highlight: Active pan-African pre-seed accelerator out of Nairobi.

programs.name: Sheraa
programs.status_detail: Sharjah Startup Studio (S3) applications open; founder-first programs since 2016.
programs.highlight: Sharjah's flagship founder ecosystem.

programs.name: MiraclePlus
programs.status_detail: Successor to YC China; runs Spring/Fall batches. 2026 Fall batch applications upcoming.
programs.highlight: China's leading YC-style accelerator, led by Lu Qi.

programs.name: SparkLabs
programs.status_detail: Seoul-based accelerator + global network of funds (incl. SparkLabs Saudi/KSU Fund I).
programs.highlight: Korea's flagship accelerator with a global footprint.

programs.name: 100X.VC
programs.status_detail: Backs pre-seed startups with ₹25 lakh via iSAFE; ~200-startup Fund II.
programs.highlight: India's prolific iSAFE-based pre-seed program.

programs.name: Axilor Ventures
programs.status_detail: 100-day program, ~10–15 startups/batch, ₹25 lakh for ~5%.
programs.highlight: Structured Indian accelerator from Infosys co-founders.

programs.name: T-Hub
programs.status_detail: One of India's largest innovation hubs; typically 0–2% equity or equity-free programs.
programs.highlight: India's largest government-backed startup hub.

programs.name: Latitud
programs.status_detail: Latitud Fellowship + Ventures; backs early-stage LatAm tech (fintech, SaaS, marketplaces).
programs.highlight: LatAm's founder community, fellowship and early-stage fund.

programs.name: Open Network Lab (Onlab)
programs.status_detail: Japan's pioneering seed accelerator; mentorship + Demo Day.
programs.highlight: One of Japan's longest-running seed accelerators.

programs.name: F/ai (Station F)
programs.operator: Station F (Xavier Niel), backed by OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Microsoft & Mistral
programs.status_detail: 2 batches of 20 companies/yr. $1M+ in AI credits + model access from all major labs. 0% equity. Recommendation-only selection. Launched Jan 2026.
programs.highlight: The first accelerator backed by every major AI lab simultaneously — OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Microsoft, Mistral, plus Sequoia & General Catalyst. Free.

programs.name: Antler ONE
programs.status_detail: Launched March 2026. €500K initial (€200K for 8.5% + €300K matching) + up to €30M follow-on. Hubs: Berlin, Amsterdam, Munich, Paris. Top 0.3% of applicants (from ~10,000).
programs.highlight: Antler's new flagship for Continental Europe — 6–10 week intensive with €500K at entry and a runway to €30M Series-C follow-on.

programs.name: CDL-Doha
programs.operator: Creative Destruction Lab / ESMT Berlin / HEC Paris, funded by QIA & QRDI
programs.status_detail: Launched Feb 2026; CDL's first Gulf/Asia site. ~20 ventures/stream/yr (3 streams), no equity, objectives-based mentoring from global scientists & operators.
programs.highlight: CDL's Middle East expansion — science-based deep-tech program at the crossroads of European expertise and Gulf capital.

programs.name: AcceleratorX
programs.focus: Seed-stage AI startups — marketing, adtech, healthtech, fintech
programs.status_detail: Cohort 1 open (Sep–Nov 2026, Demo Day Vienna). 3-month online program; distribution via 32-country agency network. Launched May 2026.
programs.highlight: Europe's first accelerator built around distribution — 2,000+ pilot-ready clients from day one, via the EU's largest marketing agency alliance.

programs.name: Google DeepMind APAC Accelerator (AI for the Planet)
programs.focus: Climate, nature conservation, sustainable agriculture & renewable energy
programs.status_detail: 3-month 2026 program; in-person bootcamp in Singapore. Open to APAC startups, research teams & non-profits. Mentorship from DeepMind & Google AI experts; no equity taken.
programs.highlight: Google DeepMind's first APAC accelerator — uses frontier AI models to tackle climate and environmental challenges across Asia Pacific.
